item.title: 三层人形机器人架构转变开启边缘人工智能机遇
item.summary: The humanoid robot industry is converging on a "big brain, small brain" architecture, with AI compute shifting from the cloud to the edge, and even to hands, feet, and other endpoints. DIGITIMES Intelligence predicts that Nvidia's CUDA will keep it dominant in the robot "big brain" layer for now, but automotive chipmak
